# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd authz missing and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-b
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-a-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-b
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-a
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-b-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-a
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-c-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-d
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-c-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-c-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-d
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-d-server
spec:
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-c
      allow: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-d-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-d-server
  routes:
    - match:
        destination:
          namespace: default
          labels:
            app: service-c
      allow: true
